creator: lasse@philomath.dk
text:
Created attachment 250676
Patch-file created according to the instructions in the Porter's Handbook

Kleene is a new tool for managing containers/jails on FreeBSD, and this is the port for CLI client.

It uses the 'sysutils/kleene-daemon' that has just been submitted as well.

See https://kleene.dev/get-started/overview/ for an introduction to Kleene.
